install_addon.title: Install OpenVPN Add-on
install_addon.description: The OpenVPN add-on needs to be installed first. Quick Setup: 1) Go to Settings → Add-ons → Add-on Store 2) Click menu → Repositories 3) Add repository URL 4) Install and Start OpenVPN Manager 5) Click Submit below. Already installed? Make sure it's Started, then click Submit.

upload.title: Upload Your VPN File
upload.description: Almost done! Upload your .ovpn file via Add-on Files tab (Settings → Add-ons → OpenVPN Manager → Files → /data/configs/). After uploading, a VPN switch will appear on your dashboard!

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to OpenVPN add-on. Make sure it's installed and started.

abort.addon_not_running: Add-on is not running. Please start it then try again.
